com.hp.workpath.api.copier

Class StoredJobAttributes.StoredJobBuilder

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.copier.StoredJobAttributes.StoredJobBuilder
  • Enclosing class:
    StoredJobAttributes

    public static class StoredJobAttributes.StoredJobBuilder
extends java.lang.Object
    Builder for creating StoredJobAttributes containing stored job attributes.
    Since:
    API 3

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      StoredJobBuilder(java.lang.String storedJobId)
      Construct a new StoredJobBuilder for releasing a stored job.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      StoredJobAttributes build(CopyAttributesCaps caps)
      Combine all of the attributes in this into a StoredJobAttributes object.
      StoredJobAttributes.StoredJobBuilder setCopies(int copies)
      Sets number of copies.
      StoredJobAttributes.StoredJobBuilder setJobCredentials(JobCredentialsAttributes jobCredentialsAttributes)
      Set stored job credentials attributes to access job.

    • Constructor Detail

      • StoredJobBuilder

        public StoredJobBuilder(java.lang.String storedJobId)
        Construct a new StoredJobBuilder for releasing a stored job.
        Parameters:
        storedJobId - ID of stored copy job.

        • storedJobId shouldn't be empty and if empty storedJobId is passed, the builder can't be created.
        • storedJobId shouldn't be null and if null is passed, exception will be thrown.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if storedJobId is null

        Since:
        API 3

    • Method Detail

      • setCopies

        public StoredJobAttributes.StoredJobBuilder setCopies(int copies)

        Sets number of copies.

        Parameters:
        copies - number of copies.

        • Minimum value of copies should be 1 and it shouldn't accept value below 1.
        • Maximum value of copies should be 9999 and it shouldn't accept value above 9999.

        Returns:

        this builder for method chaining.

        • Return value ranges from [1 to 9999].

        Since:
        API 3

      • setJobCredentials

        public StoredJobAttributes.StoredJobBuilder setJobCredentials(JobCredentialsAttributes jobCredentialsAttributes)

        Set stored job credentials attributes to access job.

        Parameters:
        jobCredentialsAttributes - contains job credentials for accessing job. Following are attributes in job credential

        • Version
        • StoreJob PasswordType
        • StoreJob Password

        Returns:

        This builder for method chaining.

        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if jobCredentialsAttributes is null.
        Since:
        API 3

      • build

        public StoredJobAttributes build(CopyAttributesCaps caps)
                          throws CapabilitiesExceededException

        Combine all of the attributes in this into a StoredJobAttributes object.

        Parameters:
        caps - Contains copy attributes capabilities.

        • capabilities shouldn't be empty or null and if null CapabilitiesExceededException will be thrown.

        Returns:
        a StoredJobAttributes object containing all of the attributes.
        Throws:
        CapabilitiesExceededException - if caps does not contain the set attribute value.
        Since:
        API 3
